topic.title: Codex auth boundary
topic.topic_summary: Tracks whether scheduled research can safely reuse a Codex session when freshness and workspace signals diverge.

current_best_hypotheses.title: Fail closed on workspace drift
current_best_hypotheses.summary: Scheduled execution should stop when backend inspection cannot confirm the configured workspace root.
current_best_hypotheses.why_currently_best: It preserves principal and workspace isolation while the session healthcheck path is still being validated.

challenger_targets.title: Warning-only stale session path
challenger_targets.summary: A stale but account-verified session might be safe to defer without blocking the queue.
challenger_targets.why_currently_best: It is not currently best; it is retained as the next challenger because it could reduce false terminal failures.

active_conflicts.summary: Freshness failure can mean recoverable token age or security-relevant identity drift.
active_conflicts.why_it_matters: The CLI must not summarize the topic as simply healthy or failed while this ambiguity is unresolved.

open_questions: Can session age be separated from workspace drift before queue retry?
Should healthcheck jobs and run.execute jobs share retry limits?

queue_overview.objective: Attack the current best hypothesis with a warning-only stale-session challenger.
queue_overview.next_visible_action: Worker may claim this after session preflight succeeds.

topic.uncertainty: Medium confidence: identity drift is dangerous, but the boundary between stale and mismatched sessions still needs adversarial verification.

run.objective: Re-evaluate whether Codex auth inspection should block scheduled execution when workspace policy drifts.
run.summary: The current best hypothesis remains in force, but the next run should isolate session age from principal drift.
run.uncertainty: The strongest unresolved uncertainty is whether a stale but account-verified session can be retried without human review.
run.conflict_delta: conf_001 remains unresolved and was escalated for the next frontier selection.
next_actions: Compare stale-session outcomes against successful account/read verification.
Keep workspace mismatch as a fail-closed condition until the challenger is adjudicated.

items.objective: Attack the current best hypothesis with a warning-only stale-session challenger.
items.next_visible_action: Worker may claim this after session preflight succeeds.

queue.operator_note: Queue mutations must go through backend retry or resume workflows.

memory.provenance_notice: Every displayed claim traces to backend provenance ids; missing provenance must stay hidden from current-best summaries.
memory.visualization_notice: Graph visualization is not a source of truth; backend graph and provenance ledgers remain authoritative.
